# Example CameraTrajectory.txt — TUM Format
# Generated by ORB-SLAM3 (Stereo-Inertial mode) on EuRoC MH_01_easy
#
# Format: timestamp tx ty tz qx qy qz qw
#   timestamp : seconds since Unix epoch (from dataset)
#   tx ty tz  : camera position in world frame (meters)
#   qx qy qz qw: camera orientation as quaternion (unit quaternion)
#
# This example trajectory simulates a UAV performing a figure-8 flight path
# in an indoor environment with gradual height change.
# Real ORB-SLAM3 output will have many more poses at camera frame rate (20 Hz).
#
# To generate real output:
#   ./scripts/run_orbslam3.sh stereo_imu /path/to/MH_01_easy
#
